text: Hey, so like, I really need my money back for that thing I bought a while ago. It was supposed to be super cool, but honestly, it didn't do anything and now I just feel ripped off. Oh, and my cat was sitting on my keyboard while I was trying to check the return policy, so I might have clicked something by accident? Anyway, could you help me get my dollars back? Thanks a ton!

Hey, I keep trying to upload my profile picture, but it just won't go through. It says something about a format error, and I’m not sure what that means. I've tried different images, but nothing's working. Any idea what's going on?

It’s been quite some time, and I really love those shoes, but now I'm quite frustrated and don’t know what to do next. Can you please assist me with getting a refund? Oh, and just to mention, I had ordered them for a special occasion that has already passed, which makes this situation even more disappointing. Thank you for your help!
